examples: Barry Goldwater IS the conscience of a conservative.
The state produced the conservative Barry Goldwater but also the liberal Mo Udall.
I was an active Young Republican and later, a Goldwater girl, right down to my cowgirl outfit.
The 1986 Goldwater-Nichols Reorganization Act shifted power from individual military services to officials responsible for coordinating them.
Nearly every Republican in Arizona is a conservative, but Flake is an old-school Goldwater conservative.
